description: Refactor the legacy monolithic Flask application at /home/ga/legacy_project/ into a microservices architecture using Docker Compose. Split the existing configuration into two services: an 'app' service for the Flask application (built from the current directory) and a 'db' service using the 'postgres:15-alpine' image. Modify the Dockerfile to remove the PostgreSQL installation and legacy startup script, ensuring it only runs the Python application. Configure the 'app' service to connect to the 'db' service using the host 'db', user 'notes_user', password 'notes_password', and database 'notes_db'. The 'db' service must include a named volume for data persistence. The final stack should be accessible at http://localhost:5000.
